role_summary: the assurance manager provides independent assura nce on financial and operational  processes to enhance reliability and stakeholder confidence.
responsibilities: • manage assurance engagements and client relationships   • evaluate internal controls and compliance frameworks   • review financial statements and d isclosures   • ensure adherence to assurance and auditing standards   • identify control gaps and recommend improvements   • prepare assurance reports for stakeholders
qualifications: • qualified ca   • strong understanding of assurance standards   • risk assessment an d analytical skills   • excellent reporting and communication skills
